prompt: A distributed application has its service configurations spread across '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/deploy/'. There are 6 environment directories: local/, dev/, staging/, uat/, prod/, and dr/. Each environment directory contains a 'services/' subdirectory with configuration files for each microservice. Your task: 1) Read the shared service registry at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/deploy/service-registry.json' to get the list of expected services. 2) For each environment, check if all expected services have configuration files. Some environments may be missing directories for newer services. 3) For each config file found, read it and verify that file paths referenced inside (log paths, data paths, cert paths) are valid for that environment (e.g., prod paths should not reference /tmp/, dev paths should not reference /prod/). 4) Generate a path validation report at '/tmp/benchmark-sandbox/reports/path-resolution-report.txt' listing per-environment: missing service configs, invalid path references, and recommended fixes.
